tools.name: projects.bigquerydatatransferProjectsLocationsDataSourcesCheckValidCreds
tools.description: Returns true if valid credentials exist for the given data source and requesting user.

tools.name: projects.bigquerydatatransferProjectsLocationsDataSourcesList
tools.description: Lists supported data sources and returns their settings.

tools.name: projects.bigquerydatatransferProjectsLocationsEnrollDataSources
tools.description: Enroll data sources in a user project. This allows users to create transfer configurations for these data sources. They will also appear in the ListDataSources RPC and as such, will appear in the [BigQuery UI](https://console.cloud.google.com/bigquery), and the documents can be found in the public guide for [BigQuery Web UI](https://cloud.google.com/bigquery/bigquery-web-ui) and [Data Transfer Service](https://cloud.google.com/bigquery/docs/working-with-transfers).

tools.name: projects.bigquerydatatransferProjectsLocationsList
tools.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.

tools.name: projects.bigquerydatatransferProjectsTransferConfigsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new data transfer configuration.

tools.name: projects.bigquerydatatransferProjectsTransferConfigsList
tools.description: Returns information about all transfer configs owned by a project in the specified location.

tools.name: projects.bigquerydatatransferProjectsTransferConfigsPatch
tools.description: Updates a data transfer configuration. All fields must be set, even if they are not updated.

tools.name: projects.bigquerydatatransferProjectsTransferConfigsRunsGet
tools.description: Returns information about the particular transfer run.

tools.name: projects.bigquerydatatransferProjectsTransferConfigsRunsList
tools.description: Returns information about running and completed transfer runs.

tools.name: projects.bigquerydatatransferProjectsTransferConfigsRunsTransferLogsList
tools.description: Returns log messages for the transfer run.

tools.name: projects.bigquerydatatransferProjectsTransferConfigsScheduleRuns
tools.description: Creates transfer runs for a time range [start_time, end_time]. For each date - or whatever granularity the data source supports - in the range, one transfer run is created. Note that runs are created per UTC time in the time range. DEPRECATED: use StartManualTransferRuns instead.

tools.name: projects.bigquerydatatransferProjectsTransferConfigsStartManualRuns
tools.description: Start manual transfer runs to be executed now with schedule_time equal to current time. The transfer runs can be created for a time range where the run_time is between start_time (inclusive) and end_time (exclusive), or for a specific run_time.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
